title: NotEnoughUpdates
description: NotEnoughUpdates (NEU) is a feature rich 1.8.9 Minecraft forge mod for Hypixel Skyblock.
body:
NotEnoughUpdates

NotEnoughUpdates (NEU) is a feature rich 1.8.9 Minecraft forge mod for Hypixel Skyblock. ## Features - An [item list](https://github.com/NotEnoughUpdates/NotEnoughUpdates-REPO) containing information and recipes about every item in skyblock. - A dungeons minimap. - Dungeon loot profit checker. - Item overlays for Treecapitator, Builder's Wand, Block Zapper, and Bonemerang. - An in-game skyblock profile viewer accessed with `/pv [player]`. - Fully customizable enchant colors accessed with `/neuec`. - Fairy soul waypoints accessed with `/neusouls`. - Customizable inventory command buttons accessed with `/neubuttons`. - The ability to change the line color of fishing rods. - Onscreen overlays for: Farming, Dwarven Mines, Pets, and the Accessory bag. - Solvers for: Enchanting and The Puzzler. - A custom Action House Search GUI. - A custom storage GUI. - A custom enchanting table GUI. - Slot Locking - Fishing Particle customization & alerts. - And [much, much, more.](https://gist.github.com/jani270/d33e249d40b0333b87ba5c5e70fca398) ## Support If you need assistance installing or using the mod, feel free to join the [discord](https://discord.gg/moulberry) and ask for help in [#neu-support](discord://discord.com/channels/516977525906341928/714332750156660756) ## Contributing If you would like to contribute to the project, look at our [contribution guide](https://github.com/NotEnoughUpdates/NotEnoughUpdates/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) for more information how to install NEU for development purposes. ## Security If you have found a vulnerability, please follow our [security policy](https://github.com/NotEnoughUpdates/NotEnoughUpdates/blob/master/.github/SECURITY.md). ## License This project is licensed under LGPL-3.0-or-later, see [COPYING](https://github.com/NotEnoughUpdates/NotEnoughUpdates/blob/master/COPYING) and [COPYING.LESSER](https://github.com/NotEnoughUpdates/NotEnoughUpdates/blob/master/COPYING.LESSER) for more details.
